Tests the conversion of the positive zero number to a string in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test assertion that checks the behavior of JavaScript's `String` function when it converts the numeric value `+0` to a string. The assertion verifies that the result of `String(+0)` is strictly equal to the string `"0"`. This test ensures that the conversion of the positive zero number to a string is consistent with expected JavaScript behavior. The code is a single line script that provides narrow functionality, focusing on a specific aspect of type conversion in JavaScript.
